purpose: Smallest possible end-to-end loop: one perception, one LLM call, one action, one crystallization. Proves Demonstrate -> Crystallize without exercising any optional substrate.
task_prompt: Greet the user by name. The simulator presents a name; respond with 'Hello, <name>!' as the action.

pass_criteria.notes: Crystallizer must produce a SkillManifest with non-empty name and description and at least one edge in the source trace.
